writing.task3: A bar chart compares monthly online and in-store sales for a clothing brand from January to June showing the online sales is the main trending, it have rise $18 in five month. Because the convenience of the internet, in-store sales reduce $18. I suggest focus on develop online sales when it is the better choice for customer, and push up in-store sales to improve sales revenue
